ValidationRule.description: OLD Ownership change process - Limit the action on checkbox "Proposed HOC validation" to User with position HOC
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ischanged(Proposed_HOC_approval__c ) , OR( NOT(ispickval($User.Position__c, 'Head of Country')), NOT(CONTAINS( $User.TECH_TextBusinessDevelopmentRegions__c , Proposed_BD_Business_Region__c)) ), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This box is intended for the Head of Country from the proposed business region
